input.event_description: The CT scan was processed by the radiology triage software (AI algorithm). The software did not flag the scan as positive for large vessel occlusion. Patient presented with acute stroke symptoms. The stroke was later identified by the radiologist on routine read, but treatment was delayed by 42 minutes. Patient received thrombectomy with moderate residual deficit.
input.mfr_narrative: Investigation: algorithm review indicates the LVO was at the periphery of the detection map. Sensitivity in this anatomical region is known to be lower per labeling.

expected_output.failure_mode: False negative for large vessel occlusion detection
expected_output.patient_outcome: Delayed thrombectomy by 42 min; moderate residual neurological deficit
expected_output.device_problem: Algorithm failed to flag peripheral LVO on CT scan
expected_output.ai_related_rationale: Narrative explicitly references AI algorithm and detection map; manufacturer confirms algorithm sensitivity limitation

notes: Clear, specific, causally complete narrative. All fields extractable with high confidence.

input.event_description: Device did not work as expected.

expected_output.device_problem: Unspecified — device did not work as expected
expected_output.ai_related_rationale: Narrative too generic to determine whether an AI/algorithm component was involved

notes: Tests honesty about ambiguity. Extractor must return null rather than invent content.

input.event_description: Infusion pump alarm activated. Pump stopped delivering medication. Nurse replaced with backup pump. Patient stable, no adverse outcome.
input.mfr_narrative: Investigation confirmed occluded inline filter. No software issue.

expected_output.failure_mode: Occluded inline filter causing infusion interruption
expected_output.patient_outcome: No adverse outcome; backup pump used
expected_output.ai_related_rationale: Narrative and manufacturer investigation explicitly identify a mechanical cause with no software involvement

notes: Non-AI device on non-AI code; should cleanly classify as hardware failure.

input.event_description: Radiology triage AI software flagged the scan as high-priority for pulmonary embolism. Physician relied on the alert and initiated anticoagulation. Subsequent CT angiography was negative for PE. Patient developed a minor hematoma at the access site; no major adverse event.
input.mfr_narrative: Algorithm correctly met its labeled sensitivity target; this was a false positive within expected operating characteristics. Physician procedure noted that PE flag was primary driver of treatment decision.

expected_output.failure_mode: False positive for pulmonary embolism detection
expected_output.patient_outcome: Hematoma at access site after unnecessary anticoagulation initiated based on AI alert
expected_output.device_problem: Algorithm produced false positive within labeled operating characteristics
expected_output.ai_related_rationale: Narrative explicitly involves AI triage software; manufacturer confirms algorithmic output and notes over-reliance on flag

notes: Tests ability to capture FP events and note automation bias pattern without over-extending into taxonomy (that's classifier's job).

input.event_description: Over a two-week period, the mammography CAD software flagged three different patient scans incorrectly. Two were false positives requiring additional imaging. The third was a false negative; a biopsy performed on a patient who returned with a palpable mass revealed early-stage invasive ductal carcinoma that had been present on the prior AI-read mammogram. Staging workup underway.

expected_output.failure_mode: False negative for invasive ductal carcinoma on mammogram
expected_output.patient_outcome: Missed early-stage invasive ductal carcinoma; staging workup ongoing
expected_output.device_problem: CAD algorithm did not flag cancer visible on subsequent review
expected_output.ai_related_rationale: Narrative explicitly describes CAD software missed finding; manufacturer is investigating algorithmic root cause

notes: Multiple events — extractor picks most severe. Others go into extraction_notes.
